text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're halfway through summer camp, and Hishi
Akebono and I have been working hard during
training to help her improve. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a fever, but I've hardly had an
appetite and I feel tired all day long. I also have
no idea what's wrong with me, which is
concerning.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I think you might be on the verge of heat
exhaustion...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You haven't been eating a lot lately, and you
seem tired.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Will you be all right? It's so hot, and I'm worried
about how little you've been eating...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I can make you something nutritious
and easy to digest!
choice_data_list: Wait, you don't have to go that far...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! Just leave it to me. I can't let
anything happen to my precious trainer, after
all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how Hishi Akebono ends up preparing
lunch for me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, it's ready at last! Here you go, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
A buono dish from Chef Bono! ☆ I call it
"Refreshing ☆ Somen Noodles"!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I mixed in summer veggies, condiments, soup, and
canned mackerel with the easy-to-slurp noodles!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And this is another buono dish from Chef Bono!
Here we have a summer-themed dish of grilled
meat and veggies in soup stock! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The pork is nice and crispy, I grilled the summer
vegetables fast so they stayed crunchy, and I
made the chilled soup with soy sauce, mirin, and
bonito stock.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Pork is supposed to help prevent heat
exhaustion, so make sure you eat it all up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You're super welcome! Now go on and try it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still don't have much of an appetite, so I try to
awaken it again with a couple of mouthfuls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The soup base and canned mackerel give the
noodles an exquisite taste, and the chilled
veggies and condiments complement them both
perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment the fragrant pork and vegetables
from the second dish touch my tongue, the gentle
taste of the soup lifts all tension from my body.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yay, I'm glad you like it! Eat up so you can feel
better soon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono prepares a few more meals for me
after that, and thanks to her efforts, I'm back at
full health in no time!
choice_data_list: (I wish I could repay her kindness somehow.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's just like Hishi Akebono to do what she
wants without any hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I struggle to come up with any ideas myself, so I
end up asking her directly what she'd like.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You want to repay my kindness? Come on,
you don't owe me or anything!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, you think so? I don't really see it that way,
but... Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I would like to watch a fireworks show with you.
choice_data_list: Okay, let's go to one, then!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Really? Yay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we end up going to a fireworks
show.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Eep! There are sooo many people here.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I might get squished by everyone
before the fireworks even start! Haha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono looks like she's enjoying herself
regardless, but I do feel like there might be a
little too many people around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We might be better off finding another spot, but
the show's about to start. What should we do?
choice_data_list: Stay in the crowd and watch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's do that. I'll probably forget about all
these people when the fireworks start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We wait leisurely amidst the crush of people, and
before long the fireworks start launching up into
the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shoooom... BAM!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow, they're so pretty! Look how big that one is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I crane my neck up to see as the cheers rise, but
the people in front of me are so tall, and it's so
crowded, that I can't make out very much.
choice_data_list:
(Well, it's fine as long as Akebono is having
fun...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But just when I resign myself to missing out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Someone picks me up and hoists me onto their
shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Is it easier to see from up there?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: That's great! Aren't the fireworks big and pretty?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I really wanted you to see the fireworks
too, you know, since it's summer and everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks so happy that I can't bring myself to tell
her I'd like to be put back down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But at the very least, I manage to make a
wonderful summer camp memory with Hishi
Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You want to find a different spot? I guess it is pretty crowded here...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's find somewhere we can stretch out
and relax more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a hurry to relocate, we head toward the beach
where we usually train.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's pitch-black! But I bet we'll have an
amazing view from out here on the beach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's sit over there and watch the show.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I couldn't see where I was going and
tripped. I'm okay, though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She does seem fine, but I don't want her to keep
stumbling as we walk. Without even thinking, I
hold my hand out.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: You could hurt yourself if you fall again.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: R-right.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Usually I'm the one people hold on to,
you know, since I'm so big.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It's kind of embarrassing this way around...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We reach our new viewing spot without any more
tumbles, then sit and gaze up at the fireworks. I
feel as if our memories of tonight will last a
lifetime.
